form.formComment: Drawn the inside. Most recently finished 5th over 450m at this track beaten 11 lengths (26.37) behind Bun Undercurrent in a Bottom Up - Grade 5 on March 30. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and fell in back straight.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 400m at Mt Gambier by 3.5 lengths in a TG1-4W. Can make it back to back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just four days ago over 400m at Mt Gambier by 3.5 lengths in a TG1-4W. Can make it back to back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.
Severely checked first turn; Checked approaching turn into back straight.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 425m at Bendigo. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 5.5 lengths at this track over 450m (25.60) beating Saint Mick in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on March 30. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th on March 20 over 410m at Horsham behind Auntie Amber beaten 11 lengths (24.34) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at this track. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last three starts, most recently over 425m at Bendigo. Tested under these conditions.
